Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 42}If you've used a {f 4 4 0 37 1 16667} in the Abyss of Time, an entrance to a special dimension with a {f 0 1 2}Great Clock{f 0 1 27} may appear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The Great Clock grants a large experience boost to a teammate of your choosing. Although you can only choose allies at a lower level than Aigis, the greater the level difference, the bigger the bonus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The entrance will continue to reappear as long as you keep using {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragments{f 0 1 27}, so don't be shy about using them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}However, entrances to the Great Clock will {f 0 1 2}vanish{f 0 1 27} if you move to another floor, so be sure to use them when they appear.[n]{f 1 1}
